body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: orientation classifier architecture
body.description:
**What changed:** Orientation classifier architecture decided: (1) clan.code_index extended to all languages with Haiku intent pass for shell/bash; (2) after-sprint skill refreshes index for committed files; (3) ClassifierDevice stubs (_query_palace_trees, _llm_classify) filled in to read clan.code_index; (4) T-orientation-classifier updated to fill ClassifierDevice stubs rather than create a new file.

**Predicted unintended effects:** (1) Haiku intent comments written to shell file headers may conflict with existing shebangs or script preambles — need to write after the shebang line, not at line 0. (2) clan.code_index schema may lack an 'intent' column — if the indexer writes intent as part of symbols blob, the merge must be clean. (3) After-sprint hook adds latency to push step — if indexer errors cascade, it could block push feedback. (4) ClassifierDevice._llm_classify stub is currently returns ('unknown', ..., 0.3) — filling it with clan.code_index reads changes the return shape; consumers of BuilderReport must handle richer task_shape values. (5) The per-commit Haiku pass on shell files during T-symbols-table-multilang sprint could accidentally overwrite intent comments on files the indexer had already processed correctly.

**Signals to watch:** Sprint-ticket push step logs for indexer errors; BuilderReport.task_shape values in logs (should be more specific than 'unknown'); clan.code_index row count after first post-commit refresh; shell files in repo for accidentally misplaced intent comments (line 0 vs line 2).

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-27 or after first full orientation-classifier sprint cycle post-ship.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** All predicted effects checked; outcome annotated; ticket closed with one-line verdict.
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
